notes: Spec asserts two user-observable bullets: (1) session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both phases anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms — kiro-cli's pre-session row (proc-<PID>) satisfies both, independent of lazy UUID-transcript materialization (kiro writes the .jsonl only after the first prompt). No model/cost/token assertions: the kiro-cli JSONL carries none of those fields (sidecar holds credits/model, daemon does not read it), so the verify observes model unknown, cost/tokens not asserted — orthogonal to this state+PID scenario.

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
